headline: CDC Halts Testing For 27 Infectious Diseases Including COVID-19, Rabies Amid Agency Downsizing
summary: CDC pauses 27 infectious disease tests, including COVID-19, rabies, amid downsizing under HHS, while some tests remain commercially available.
